top_signals.title: BlackRock files new amendment for yield-generating bitcoin ETF; launch expected soon, Bloomberg analyst says
top_signals.summary: BlackRock's new bitcoin fund seeks to provide yield through active covered call strategies on IBIT shares and ETP indices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
